catalog.name: Boma Mabati Factory Ltd - Product Catalog

delivery.notes: Delivery charges calculated based on location and order size

categories.name: Corrugated Sheets
categories.description: Standard corrugated roofing sheets — affordable, durable, and widely used for residential and commercial roofing.
categories.base_price_note: Prices vary by gauge (thickness). Thinner = lighter & cheaper; thicker = stronger & longer-lasting.

products.name: Corrugated Sheet (30 Gauge)
products.description: Lightweight corrugated sheet suitable for temporary structures, sheds, and budget-friendly roofing.
features: Lightweight — easy to transport and install

products.name: Corrugated Sheet (28 Gauge)
products.description: Standard residential corrugated sheet balancing affordability with durability.
features: Most popular gauge for residential use
Good balance of cost and durability

products.name: Corrugated Sheet (26 Gauge)
products.description: Heavy-duty corrugated sheet for permanent structures requiring maximum durability.
features: Longer lifespan — ideal for permanent structures

categories.name: IBR / Box Profile Sheets
categories.description: Premium IBR (Inverted Box Rib) profile sheets — stronger, more rigid, and more aesthetically pleasing than standard corrugated. The #1 recommendation for quality-conscious builders.
categories.base_price_note: IBR sheets offer superior load-bearing capacity and a modern profile finish. Well worth the upgrade from corrugated.
categories.upsell_message: Upgrade from corrugated to IBR for just KES {price_diff} extra per sheet — get stronger, better-looking roofing that lasts longer.

products.name: IBR Profile Sheet (28 Gauge)
products.description: Premium IBR sheet with a box-rib profile — offers greater strength and rigidity than standard corrugated at a competitive price.

products.name: IBR Profile Sheet (26 Gauge)
products.description: Heavy-gauge IBR profile sheet for premium commercial and high-end residential projects.

categories.name: Structural Steel
categories.description: Steel support structures for roofing — purlins, trusses, and accessories. Essential for a strong, durable roof frame.

products.name: C-Purlin 100mm
products.description: Light-duty C-channel purlin for smaller roof spans and light roofing materials.
features: Suitable for small to medium roof spans

products.name: C-Purlin 125mm
products.description: Medium-duty C-channel purlin for standard residential and light commercial roof spans.

products.name: C-Purlin 150mm
products.description: Heavy-duty C-channel purlin for large roof spans and commercial/industrial applications.

products.name: Light-Duty Roof Truss
products.description: Pre-fabricated light-duty roof truss for small residential structures.

products.name: Standard Roof Truss
products.description: Pre-fabricated standard roof truss for residential buildings. Suitable for 6m–8m spans.

categories.name: Roofing Accessories
categories.description: Essential roofing accessories — fasteners, flashings, ridges, and sealants to complete your roofing project.

products.name: Ridge Cap (Corrugated)
products.description: Galvanized ridge cap for corrugated roofing sheets.

products.name: Ridge Cap (IBR Profile)
products.description: Galvanized ridge cap for IBR profile roofing sheets.

products.name: Roofing Nails (1kg pack)
products.description: Galvanized roofing nails with rubber washers for secure sheet fastening.

products.name: Self-Drilling Roofing Screws (100-pack)
products.description: Self-drilling screws with EPDM washers for IBR and structural steel attachment.

products.name: Flashing (Galvanized)
products.description: Galvanized flashing for roof edges, valleys, and wall junctions.

upsell_paths.message: For just KES 100 more per sheet, upgrade to 28-gauge — the standard for Kenyan homes. Stronger and longer-lasting.
For just KES 300 more per sheet, go heavy-duty 26-gauge — built to last a lifetime.
For just KES 200 more per sheet, upgrade to 26-gauge for maximum durability.
Upgrade from standard corrugated to IBR profile for just KES 300 more per sheet — stronger, better looking, and longer lasting.
For just KES 400 more per sheet, get the premium IBR 26-gauge — the ultimate roofing solution.
For just KES 300 more per sheet, go for heavy-gauge IBR — maximum strength and premium finish.

bundles.name: Starter Roof Pack
bundles.description: Everything needed for a basic corrugated roof installation.
bundles.message: Save 5% with the Starter Roof Pack — your complete corrugated roofing bundle.

bundles.name: IBR Premium Roof Pack
bundles.description: Complete IBR roof kit with all accessories for a professional finish.
bundles.message: Save 7% with the IBR Premium Roof Pack — the complete premium roofing solution.

steps.description: AI agent greets the customer and asks about project type, size, and location.
Guide customer through product categories and recommend based on their needs.
Generate price estimate with itemized breakdown.
Suggest upgrade options (e.g. corrugated → IBR) or bundle deals.
Send M-Pesa payment link or provide bank transfer details.
Confirm delivery date and location within Nairobi area.
48-hour abandoned cart recovery message if no payment received.

ai_agent_context.greeting_message:
Hello! Welcome to Boma Mabati Factory Ltd 👋

I'm your sales assistant. I can help you with:
• Instant price quotes on roofing materials
• Product recommendations for your project
• Order placement with M-Pesa payment
• Delivery booking (Nairobi area)

To get started, could you tell me:
1. What type of project is this? (Home, commercial, shed, etc.)
2. What roofing material are you looking for? (Corrugated sheets, IBR profile, or structural steel?)
3. What quantity do you need?
4. Where is the delivery location?
ai_agent_context.abandoned_cart_message:
Hello! 👋

You recently requested a quote from Boma Mabati Factory Ltd but didn't complete your order. Is there anything I can help with?

• Questions about the products?
• Need a revised quote?
• Ready to place your order now?

Just reply and I'll be happy to assist! 😊
ai_agent_context.payment_confirmation_message:
Thank you for your order! ✅

Your M-Pesa payment link has been sent.

Here's a summary:
{order_summary}

Once payment is confirmed, we'll arrange delivery within 1-3 business days.

Need to change anything? Just let me know!
ai_agent_context.social_proof: ⭐ Rated 4.3 out of 5 by 95 buyers near you
